author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 + Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
Join us on June 9 at 7am PT / 10am ET for Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 followed immediately by Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026.
 
The livestream kicks off with Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026, which will run for roughly 50 minutes and highlight upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch games. Immediately following, Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026 will premiere and last around 95 minutes, showcasing gameplay of select titles featured during the Nintendo Direct.

00:00 - Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
56:36 - Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026

#NintendoDirect #NintendoTreehouseLive

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

text:
Star Fox – GameChat Multiplayer Gameplay – Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
Star Fox releases June 25, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2. Pre-order now: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/star-fox-switch-2/

Hop into the cockpit with Nintendo Treehouse: Live and get a look at Star Fox multiplayer via GameChat! There are some pretty cool AR filters and avatars too.

Splatoon Raiders releases July 23, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2. Pre-order now: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/splatoon-raiders-switch-2/

Venture to the Spirhalite Islands with the Nintendo Treehouse: Live crew in Splatoon Raiders! This deep dive into gameplay features Deep Cut, new Salmonids, and plenty of treasure of course.

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition – Overview Trailer
Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition is available now on Nintendo eShop: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/xenoblade-chronicles-definitive-edition-nintendo-switch-2-edition-switch-2/

Enjoy this critically acclaimed RPG with enhancements and additions! The Nintendo Switch 2 Edition of this game features improved visuals, smoother and sharper cutscenes, and more content for you to enjoy! Race across the Bionis and Mechonis on the high-powered Ether Jet—both in the main game and in the Future Connected epilogue—unlock additional equipment, experience fully voiced Heart-to-Heart conversations for the first time, and more.

Nintendo Switch 2 players who already have Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition on Nintendo Switch can upgrade to the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition by purchasing the upgrade pack.

#XenobladeChronicles #NintendoSwitch2

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

text:
KINGDOM HEARTS Collection [I~III] – Announcement Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
KINGDOM HEARTS Collection [I~III] is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 on Oct 8, 2026. Pre-order today: 
https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/kingdom-hearts-collection-i-iii-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=A1013-01&utm_id=A1013-01

Join Sora, Donald and Goofy as they travel through Disney & Pixar worlds to overcome Darkness through the power of the Keyblade. While adventuring, experience stories and create friendships with an iconic cast of characters.

Experience the KINGDOM HEARTS series with this perfect entry point for new players and long-time fans alike.

#NintendoDirect #KINGDOMHEARTS #NintendoSwitch2

text:
Partner Spotlight Sizzle Reel - Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
Take a look at some upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch games shown during the Nintendo Direct!

Games include:
• FINAL FANTASY XIV 
• Tales of Eternia Remastered 
• Atelier Karia: The Night Kingdom & the Guide of Memories
• Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration
• METAL GEAR SOLID: MASTER COLLECTION Vol.2
• Snow Runner 
• Observer: System Redux
• Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine DAYZ
• Everbloom
• Fitness Boxing 3: Your Personal Trainer – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

#NintendoDirect #NintendoSwitch2 #NintendoSwitch

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Minecraft – Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
Minecraft is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in 2026. 
https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/minecraft-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=A1013-01&utm_id=A1013-01

Survive the night or create a work of art in Minecraft, the ultimate sandbox game! Now with Vibrant Visuals, a graphics upgrade that transforms the way players experience Minecraft with enhanced visual elements such as improved lighting, fog, and more.

Uncover mysteries and face thrilling foes in an infinite world that’s unique in every playthrough. Have a blast with friends, whether you’re sitting on the same couch in split-screen or miles apart. 

#NintendoSwitch2 #NintendoDirect #Minecraft

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Metaphor: ReFantazio – Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
Metaphor: ReFantazio is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 on Nov 12, 2026.

Enter the royal tournament to fight for the throne and for the future. Control your destiny, face your fears and awaken magical Archetype powers that lie dormant in your heart.

Team up with a compelling cast of characters and embark on an immersive journey that promises hours of captivating exploration, exhilarating discovery, and dynamic combat that blends turn-based strategy with real-time action.
 
#Metaphor #NintendoDirect #NintendoSwitch2

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
DELTARUNE – Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
New adventures are blooming in DELTARUNE Chapter 5, a free update coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch on June 24, 2026.

Join Kris, Susie, and Ralsei as they continue their journey to seal the Dark Fountains that threaten the world. Fight or spare your way through action-packed battles alongside an endearing cast of new and familiar characters in this epic role-playing adventure that serves as the parallel story to UNDERTALE.

#NintendoDirect #Deltarune #NintendoSwitch #NintendoSwitch2

Splatoon Raiders – Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
Splatoon Raiders is launching for Nintendo Switch 2 on July 23, 2026! Pre-order today: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/splatoon-raiders-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=A1013-01&utm_id=A1013-01

Team up with the musical trio Deep Cut and hunt for treasure on the Spirahlite Islands in this new single-player-focused game.

Stay tuned for even more details in the upcoming Splatoon Raiders Direct, airing on June 30. Look out for more info in the future.

#SplatoonRaiders #NintendoDirect #NintendoSwitch2

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
The Duskbloods – Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
The Duskbloods launches exclusively on Nintendo Switch 2 in 2026, with a closed network test coming soon.

Step into this new PvPvE multiplayer action game from FromSoftware, where you take on the role of a Bloodsworn. Fight through a world overrun with enemies using unique weapons and abilities, while occasionally forming transient alliances on your path to victory.

#NintendoDirect #TheDuskbloods #NintendoSwitch2
